---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or platform enhancement with clear scope and acceptance criteria
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Objective

- What outcome should this change enable?

## Problem Statement

- What current limitation or workflow gap is being solved?

## Proposed Behavior

- User-facing behavior:
- Operator-facing behavior:
- AI / provider / storage implications:

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Security And Data Considerations

- Permission boundary impact:
- Secret or provider handling impact:
- Audit or observability impact:
- Import / export / backup compatibility impact:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is clear and testable
- [ ] Failure mode is defined
- [ ] Documentation impact is identified
- [ ] Long-term maintainability impact is considered

- Related docs:
